current_implemented_build: V51.1 Executive Story and CTA Cleanup
patch_type: UI cleanup and release-chain alignment patch, not a new strategic product layer
release_chain_status: Deconflicted after Nate review feedback. README, bots.txt, governance-summary.json, index.html Settings/admin metadata, successor handoff, and builder-version-log should all identify V51.1 as the current cleanup patch on top of V51.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
core_thesis: AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
core_question: Should this action be operationally admissible right now?
v51_positioning_line: When everything can be faked, CyberShield helps prove what can be trusted.
v51_1_cleanup_changes: V51 positioning line is visible in Briefing
first-9-seconds standard restored as visible executive cards
Trust Under Attack is prominent early in Briefing
Official Source Verification Gate is simplified into five plain questions
Brand and Identity Impersonation is framed as cross-domain TrustMap risk
primary CTAs are reduced to two assessment offers
secondary advisory paths stay in Proof Pack
build/version metadata remains in Settings/admin payload only

official_source_verification_gate: Is it safe to rely on before action?

secondary_paths: Evidence Register and Proof Pack Buildout
commercial_path.advisor_positioning: Led by Maximum Justice Cybersecurity and Dr. Max Justice, vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.

prototype_boundary: The current public build is a static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, GRC, CRM, cloud telemetry, Google Sheets sync, platform takedown systems, marketplace systems, ad platforms, ticketing systems, notification systems, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, or production agent enforcement systems.
overclaim_prohibitions: no live notification or ticketing claims
